changeSummary: Added a shared canonical-target lookup signal for quoted single-target and date-bucket queries that need handle resolution before downstream execution.

Extended the named-target policy guard to flag discovery calls that reuse the full narrative question or quoted market sentence instead of extracting canonical lookup variables and resolving exact handles first.

Strengthened the shared policy-fix guidance so repaired plans define explicit eventQuery/requestedTarget variables, resolve a canonical handle once, and then execute from the bounded resolved-target set.

notes: The experiment keys off general query structure: quoted single-target prompts, date buckets, and raw narrative discovery reuse, not contributor names or vendor-specific methods.
The guard prefers canonical handles such as slug, conditionId, tokenId, or exact resolved names and keeps all logic in shared runtime modules.
No route wrappers or contributor server files were modified.

testsRun.command: pnpm exec tsx <<'EOF' ... ContextClient query smoke for PSG market parameters ... EOF
pnpm exec tsx <<'EOF' ... ContextClient query smoke for World Cup winner comparison ... EOF

notes: SDK smoke query 1 returned a non-error clarification_required result with a non-empty response for the PSG market-parameters prompt; this satisfies the crash-only gate.
SDK smoke query 2 returned a non-error answer result with a non-empty response for the World Cup comparison prompt.
Code-path parity passed because both /api/v1/query and /api/chat import the shared execution engine from context/lib/ai/agentic-execution.ts.

revertInstructions: Use the snapshot at /Users/alex/Documents/context-sdk/examples/server/polymarket-contributor/validation/runtime-experiment-snapshot.latest.json to restore the pre-experiment versions of the three changed shared-runtime files if the orchestrator rejects the experiment.
Do not revert route wrappers or contributor server files; the experiment touched shared runtime code only.

finalDecision.reason: Decision artifact rejected the planning experiment after regression review: target dimension did not improve and several non-target dimensions regressed beyond tolerance.

openRisks: The raw-narrative lookup detector uses conservative identifier heuristics when the search query is not a literal, so future planner variable naming could still affect whether a weak plan is caught.

The first smoke prompt remained healthy but clarified instead of answering, which is acceptable for this crash-only gate but means the orchestrator still needs full regression measurement for quality impact.
Focused validation did not add new test cases because the experiment was constrained to the approved runtime files.
